/usr/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/core.dir/objects.a
/usr/bin/i686-w64-mingw32-ar qc CMakeFiles/core.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/core.dir/objects1.rsp
/usr/bin/i686-w64-mingw32-g++ -m32 -shared -o ../../bin/libcore.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libcore.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/core.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles/core.dir/linkLibs.rsp
